item.title: Dembele sends PSG past wounded Liverpool into Champions League semis
item.description: Ousmane Dembele's double guided Paris Saint-Germain into the Champions League semi-finals as a 2-0 win over Liverpool at Anfield on Tuesday completed a 4-0 aggregate win for the holders....

item.title: Atletico resist Barca comeback to reach Champions League semis
item.description:
Atletico Madrid sent 10-man Barcelona crashing out of the Champions League and reached the final four with a 3-2 aggregate victory despite Tuesday's 2-1 quarter-final second leg defeat.
...
